Interface Metamodel.ObjectType

All Superinterfaces:
Metamodel.Featured, Metamodel.Named, Metamodel.Slotted, Metamodel.Type
All Known Implementing Classes:
EcoreMetamodel.EcoreObjectType
Enclosing interface:
Metamodel
public static interface Metamodel.ObjectType extends Metamodel.Slotted, Metamodel.Featured
An object is a model element that can contain others, and contain reference to others.
